name: kulas-foods-and-condiments
description: Kulas Foods and Condiments — animated 3D landing page (Vite + React Three Fiber) with an Express API backend.

scripts.setup: npm install && npm install --prefix client && npm install --prefix server
scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n CLIENT,SERVER -c yellow,red "npm --prefix client run dev" "npm --prefix server run dev"
